CustomObject.description: Defines required document types per NEPA review type for administrative record completeness scoring. Seeded with minimum viable checklist per CEQ regulations. Used by NEPA_Administrative_Record_Checker Flow to calculate IndividualApplication.nepa_record_completeness__c.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Required Document

fields.description: NEPA review type this requirement applies to: CE, EA, or EIS.
fields.label: Review Type

fields.description: Required document type. Must match a valid value in ContentVersion.nepa_document_type__c.
fields.label: Document Type

fields.description: The exact nepa_event_type__c picklist value on ApplicationTimeline that gates this document. When a timeline event of this type is set to Completed, NEPA_Stage_Gate_Doc_Check verifies the document is present before allowing the save. Must exactly match a value in ApplicationTimeline.nepa_event_type__c. Leave blank to omit from gate checks (document is scored but not gate-blocking).
fields.label: Gate Event Type

fields.description: When true, the document must be present in Approved or Published status for the process to reach full completeness. When false, the document is recommended but not counted in the score. SubscriberControlled so agencies can adjust requirements to their process.
fields.label: Is Required

fields.description: Process stage by which this document must be present (informational). Used to generate missing-document alert context. SubscriberControlled so agencies can tune stage gates.
fields.label: Stage Required By

fields.description: Sort order for display in completeness gap messages. SubscriberControlled so agencies can reorder their document checklist.
fields.label: Display Order

fields.description: Inactive rules are excluded from completeness calculations. SubscriberControlled so agencies can enable/disable requirements without a package update.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Post-decision monitoring phase: Mitigation, ESA_Consultation, Water_Quality, Species_Monitoring, Adaptive_Management. Null for pre-decision documents. Used by NEPA_PostDecision_Monitor_Scheduler to group tasks by phase on the monitoring dashboard.
fields.label: Monitoring Phase

fields.description: Number of days between required document submissions for recurring post-decision documents (e.g., 365 = annual, 90 = quarterly, 180 = semi-annual). Null for one-time or gate-triggered documents. NEPA_PostDecision_Monitor_Scheduler uses this to compute Task due dates and recurrence.
fields.label: Frequency (Days)

fields.description: Litigation risk if this document is absent or overdue: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, or VERY_HIGH. Derived from PermitTEC corpus analysis and statutory citizen-suit provisions. Surfaced in the Defensibility Gap Checker gap message.
fields.label: Litigation Risk If Absent

fields.description: Date this record version becomes effective. Flows compare inp_EvaluationDate (= nepa_start_date__c on the IA) against this: only records where Effective_Start_Date__c IS NULL OR <= EvaluationDate are returned. Null = effective from the beginning of time.
fields.label: Effective Start Date

fields.description: Date after which this record version is no longer effective (EO 14270 sunset compliance). Flows filter: Sunset_Date__c IS NULL OR >= EvaluationDate. Null = no sunset.
fields.label: Sunset Date
